CFG.TIME_TRACKING_DESC: Controls when Super Productivity tracked time is posted to Basecamp timesheet entries. Existing configs default to posting on stop and done.
CFG.OAUTH_NOTE: OAuth tokens are stored locally on this device by the host app and are not synced.
CFG.CLIENT_ID_DESC: Optional. Use your own Launchpad app client ID instead of the bundled Basecamp client.
CFG.CLIENT_SECRET_DESC: Optional. Use your own Launchpad app public client secret instead of the bundled Basecamp client. Note: this is stored in the provider config and syncs with your other settings (and may be unencrypted on some sync backends), like other provider passwords.
CFG.REDIRECT_URI_DESC: Optional. Must match a redirect URI registered on your Launchpad app. Defaults to the host loopback callback when left empty.

ERRORS.NOT_AUTHENTICATED: Basecamp: Not authenticated. Please connect your account.
ERRORS.TIMESHEET_UNAVAILABLE: Basecamp: Timesheets are unavailable or inaccessible for this project. Time tracking is ignored.
ERRORS.TIMESHEET_VALIDATION_FAILED: Basecamp: Timesheet validation or configuration failed. Time tracking is paused until resolved.
ERRORS.RATE_LIMITED: Basecamp: Rate limited by the server. Time tracking will be retried later.
